DESCRIPTION: Customer 360 Architecture: Best practices: Native Apps for third-party data (no copying), Secure Data Sharing (zero-copy, no storage charges), External Tables for querying data lake in place, Reader Accounts with resource monitors for cost control, External Network Rules for egress control to public APIs (Healthcare API), ML models for propensity scoring and real-time predictions.
